brief: Today's news features the murder of former UK MP Ann Widdecombe, ongoing controversies around ICE shootings, and a deadly wildfire in Spain. Research highlights include visual analytics for missing data and AI use in crime linkage.
news_summary: A man is arrested for the murder of former MP Ann Widdecombe; federal immigration agents have shot at least 21 people since last year, resulting in five deaths; a fast-spreading wildfire in southern Spain has killed at least 12.
papers_summary: Papers explore visual analytics for missing data imputation, AI-assisted crime linkage, and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface clinical trials in China.

en.brief: Today's news features the murder of former UK MP Ann Widdecombe, ongoing controversies around ICE shootings, and a deadly wildfire in Spain. Research highlights include visual analytics for missing data and AI use in crime linkage.
en.news_summary: A man is arrested for the murder of former MP Ann Widdecombe; federal immigration agents have shot at least 21 people since last year, resulting in five deaths; a fast-spreading wildfire in southern Spain has killed at least 12.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore visual analytics for missing data imputation, AI-assisted crime linkage, and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface clinical trials in China.

zh.brief: 今日多地灾祸频发：福建鞋厂大火致28死、广西水坝失守、超强台风逼近；英国前议员谋杀案嫌疑犯被捕；同时，英国工党启动党魁选举、全球AI与科研进展持续。
zh.news_summary: 福建晋江鞋厂大火致28人遇难，习近平指示严查；广西北部湾水坝在暴雨中失守，引发老旧设施安全讨论；超强台风巴威逼近台湾，多地停班停课。国际方面，英国前议员安·维德库姆被谋杀，嫌疑人被捕；新加坡夫妇收养印尼男婴涉人口贩运；美伊冲突持续。
zh.papers_summary: 学术研究聚焦AI辅助犯罪分析、缺失数据可视化和脑机接口临床转化等领域；此外，深度学习用于手语识别、AI在隐私擦除中的信任问题等主题也有新进展。

todays_image.caption: A fire badge for a foreman suggests a change in command, just as Democrats grapple with their own leadership switch in Maine.
todays_image.title: Fire Badge "Chicago Fire Dept. Foreman"
